problem.title: Your logistics is leaking money where you
points: 91% of your trucks leave with unused space.
Your team plans routes by hand, 3 hours a day.
Rejections surface only after the customer complains.
Every system speaks a different language and nothing reconciles.

platform.title: One platform.
platform.description: Warehouse, transport, routing and palletizing working together in real time. It doesn't replace your ERP —it makes it stronger.

warehouse.title: Warehouse
warehouse.body: AI-driven receiving, putaway and picking. Automatic FEFO and 99.9% inventory accuracy.

transport.title: Transport
transport.body: Owned and outsourced fleet in one view. Every shipment leaves with its paperwork in order.

route.title: Routing
route.body: Optimal routes instantly, computed alongside palletizing. Fewer miles, lower cost.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.body: Digital proof of delivery and full traceability. The last point closes the loop.

items.result: Lower transport cost by loading to 99%
Fewer rejections with FEFO and per-customer shelf life
Collection traceability and −70 t CO₂/year

cta.title: See what you're losing today
cta.subtitle: Book a 30-minute demo and we'll show you your savings with your own data.

wms.name: WMS
wms.title: Warehouse Management
wms.subtitle: Geodot WMS sees what your ERP can't: every pack, every lot, every expiration date. Automatic FEFO, per-customer shelf life and AI-optimized picking so customers stop rejecting your deliveries.

problem.title: Your warehouse loses money where you're not looking
points: Expired product: you discover the expiration when it's too late to sell it.
Slow picking: operators walk extra miles with no optimized route.
Phantom stock: the system says one thing, the floor says another.
Customer rejections: you ship low-shelf-life product and it comes back.
No traceability: you don't know which lot you delivered to each customer.

solution.title: A WMS that controls every pack, not just every pallet

steps.title: Smart locations
steps.description: Multi-level structure with 3D visualization. The system tells you where to store each product based on its turnover and constraints.

steps.title: Full traceability
steps.description: By lot, expiration date and label. Immutable history of every movement for audit and compliance.

steps.title: Automatic FIFO/FEFO
steps.description: Configurable rules and per-customer shelf life (e.g. a major chain, 83%). Blocks shipping of soon-to-expire product before it becomes a rejection.

steps.title: Optimized picking
steps.description: The same routing engine, applied inside the warehouse. AI overnight reorganization and step-by-step guides for your operators.

cta.title: Take control of your warehouse, down to the last pack
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you the WMS running with your own SKUs.

tms.name: TMS
tms.tagline: Your fleet under control, owned or outsourced
tms.title: Transport Management
tms.subtitle: Manage owned and outsourced fleets from a single screen. Live tracking, up-to-date paperwork, automatic settlement and costs attributed to every route and customer.

problem.title: Transport is your biggest cost and your biggest blind spot
points: No visibility: you don't know where your trucks are right now.
Uncontrolled third parties: carriers operating however they want.
Expired paperwork: permits and licenses that lapse without warning.
Opaque costs: you can't tell what each route or customer really costs.
Manual coordination: phone calls and WhatsApp to move every truck.

solution.title: Full control of your transport operation

steps.title: Live tracking
steps.description: Position by position on the map, per-customer geofences and automatic measurement of the real time each truck spends at every stop.

steps.title: Unified fleet
steps.description: Owned and outsourced fleet in the same view. Carrier portal with approval workflows and shared visibility.

steps.title: Documents and maintenance
steps.description: Expiration alerts for permits, licenses and insurance. Preventive maintenance by mileage or time.

steps.title: Automatic settlement
steps.description: Calculation by kilometer, delivery or mixed. Fuel control and accounting export ready for payment.

cta.title: Put your entire fleet under control
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and unify owned and outsourced fleets in a single screen.

paletizado.name: Smart Palletizing
paletizado.tagline: From 85% to 99% load, no safety margin
paletizado.title: Smart
paletizado.subtitle: The only system that calculates palletizing while it routes. It knows exactly what fits in each truck before it leaves, so you load to 100% without fear it won't fit.

problem.title: 1 in 7 of your trucks travels with empty space
points: Safety margin: you load to 85% "just in case" it won't fit.
Rules in someone's head: the expert palletizer knows, the system doesn't.
In-transit damage: poorly stacked products that arrive broken.
Slow picking: operators with no clear guide on how to build each pallet.
Load rejections: the customer receives crushed product and sends it back.

steps.title: 300+ parameters
steps.description: Dimensions, weight, stackability, fragility, temperature and compatibility of every product, computed on every load.

steps.title: Smart rules
steps.description: Stacking by product, family, customer, fragility and legal axle weight. The expert's knowledge, encoded in the system.

steps.title: Simultaneous recalculation
steps.description: Every time you add an order to a route, the system recalculates whether it really fits and warns you before the truck leaves badly loaded.

steps.title: Visual build guides
steps.description: Which product goes in each layer and position, with step-by-step sequence and operator validation.

cta.title: How many extra trucks are you paying for every week?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll calculate your savings with simultaneous palletizing and routing.

torreControl.name: Control Tower
torreControl.title: Control Tower
torreControl.subtitle: A single board to see, anticipate and act on your entire chain, from the warehouse to the last delivery. What you used to find out through a complaint, you now solve before it happens.

problem.title: You operate blind until it's too late to react
points: Fragmented information: each system shows its own slice.
Late reaction: you find out about problems once they've already hit.
No clear metrics: you don't know what's working and what isn't.
Manual reports: hours building Excel for management.
Customers in the dark: they can't see the status of their orders.

solution.title: Your whole operation on a single screen

steps.title: Live dashboard
steps.description: Operations map with every truck, delivery status, active alerts and daily KPIs compared against the average.

steps.title: Proactive alerts
steps.description: Configurable and escalating. Stopped truck, customer delay, late route or compromised cold chain, via dashboard, email, WhatsApp or SMS.

steps.title: Predictive AI
steps.description: Predicts delays before they happen, detects anomalies and suggests optimizations that learn from every delivery.

steps.title: Customer portal
steps.description: Customers see where their delivery is, live ETA, history and documents. Automatic daily, weekly and monthly reports.

cta.title: How much does every incident you catch late cost you?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and unify WMS, TMS, Routing and Palletizing in a single board.

bebidas.name: Beverages
bebidas.title: Beverages &
bebidas.subtitle: Your trucks leave at 85% "just in case," and planning routes by hand eats hours every day. Load at 100%, cut wasted trips and lower transport cost: 15+ years solving returnables, mixed palletizing and last-mile distribution with leading bottlers.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Returnables: every truck reserves space for the empties coming back, and no one knows exactly how much.
Mixed palletizing: glass, PET, can and Tetra Pak, each with its own stacking rules (glass goes on the bottom).
15% safety margin: you load at 85% because you don't know if the pallet plan will fit.
BASIS integration: your core system lacks modern interfaces and stays siloed.
Specialized equipment (Tiger): not every SKU can be moved by full layer.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Truck load factor from 85% to 99% with simultaneous palletizing and routing.
Planning time cut from 3 hours to 15 minutes.
Full visibility of owned and third-party fleet.

cta.title: Ready to load your trucks at 100%?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you, on your own operation, how to go from 85% to 99% load factor.

alimentos.name: Food & Dairy
alimentos.tagline: Cold chain and expiry under control
alimentos.title: Food &
alimentos.subtitle: Every expired case in the warehouse and every supermarket rejection for shelf life is money walking out the door. Automatic FEFO, batch traceability and monitored cold chain so they stop rejecting you and you never lose product to expiration again.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: FEFO rotation: the oldest product should ship first, but your warehouse isn't set up to enforce it.
Per-customer shelf life: each chain demands a different percentage (una gran cadena, 83%) or rejects the truck.
Cold chain: product leaves at 4°C and arrives at 12°C with no view of what happened en route.
Recall: when a problem appears you don't know which customers received that batch.
Returns and rejections: without the reason logged, you can't fix the root cause.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Lower losses from expired product with automatic FEFO.
Shelf-life rejections eliminated with per-customer rules.
Full batch-to-customer traceability for targeted recalls.

cta.title: How much do you lose every month to expired product?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you how to eliminate those losses and shelf-life rejections.

gobiernoResiduos.name: Government & Waste
gobiernoResiduos.tagline: Routes and collection with full visibility
gobiernoResiduos.title: Government &
gobiernoResiduos.subtitle: Cleaner cities, lower spend and satisfied residents. AI-optimized collection routing, a citizen app and full transparency: fewer kilometers, less fuel, fewer emissions and fewer complaints.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Outdated routes: designed years ago while the city has grown and changed.
Underused fleet: some trucks leave full, others half empty.
No visibility: you don't know where the trucks are in real time.
Uninformed residents: they don't know when the truck passes, so complaints pile up.
High costs: unnecessary kilometers and wasted fuel, every single day.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Fewer kilometers driven with AI-optimized routing.
Fewer citizen complaints with app and control tower.
Tons of CO₂ avoided through shorter routes.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your collection service?
cta.subtitle: Book a meeting and we'll deliver an initial savings assessment at no cost.

logistica3pl.name: 3PL Logistics
logistica3pl.tagline: Multi-client, billing and SLAs in one place
logistica3pl.title: Logistics Operators
logistica3pl.subtitle: Every client wants their own rules, SLAs and reports, and building them by hand burns hours and margin. Manage every account from one platform, with a 24/7 visibility portal and automatic settlement that sets you apart from the competition.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Multi-client: each account with its own rules, SLAs and report format.
Client visibility: they want to know where their goods are in real time, today.
Load consolidation: orders from multiple clients to the same area, hard to combine by hand.
Billing and settlement: pricing each service is manual, slow and error-prone.
Differentiated SLAs: meeting 24h, 48h and specific windows at once is a juggling act.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Time on reports cut from 20 to 2 hours per week.
Billing time cut from 3 days to 4 hours with automatic settlement.
Truck utilization from 70% to 85% with smart consolidation.

cta.title: Ready to stand out from the competition?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you how to manage all your accounts from a single platform.

healthcare.name: Healthcare & Pharma
healthcare.tagline: Compliance, cold chain and regulatory traceability
healthcare.title: Healthcare &
healthcare.subtitle: When what you move is lives, there's no margin for error. Guaranteed cold chain, end-to-end chain-of-custody traceability and smart dispatch that prioritizes urgency: the logistics pharma, labs and patient transfers demand.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Critical cold chain: a sample or medicine outside 2-8°C is a lost diagnosis or discarded product.
Regulatory traceability: every movement is logged with timestamp, temperature and owner for audits.
Strict time windows: samples have a shelf life and transfers are measured in minutes, not hours.
Thousands of SKUs with expiry dates: FIFO mandated by law, lots, controlled products and recall traceability.
Dispatch by urgency and capacity: the right unit, with the right equipment, to the right place.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Response time in an ambulance service with smart dispatch by proximity and capacity.
Chain-of-custody traceability, from the collection point to the central lab.
Out-of-FIFO expirations with automatic alerts and lot management per branch.

cta.title: Ready for logistics with zero tolerance for error?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you how to guarantee cold chain, traceability and smart dispatch in a single platform.

recintosFiscales.name: Bonded Warehouses
recintosFiscales.title: Bonded &
recintosFiscales.subtitle: A facility under ANAM, IMMEX and OEA scrutiny can't run on manual control and loose paperwork. Geodot digitizes the warehouse, document reconciliation and the traceability the authority requires, with video evidence and 24/7 remote access. Real case: 7,000 m² at AIFA.

problem.title: Specific challenges we solve
points: Regulatory compliance: ANAM, IMMEX and OEA require integrated inventory, video and traceability, with remote access for the authority.
Document control: pedimentos, MAWBs and waybills arrive in disparate formats and reconciling them by hand is slow and error-prone.
Goods in custody: every movement inside the facility must be logged and auditable.
Differentiated zones: hazardous, refrigerated and standard cargo coexist under different rules in the same warehouse.
Physical vs. document reconciliation: counting boxes in and out against what was declared, with video evidence.

modules.title: Modules most used in your industry

items.result: Bonded warehouse at AIFA digitized with iWMS and Etiqueta Zero, three zones (hazardous, refrigerated, standard).
Boxes loaded and unloaded counted with video evidence correlated to scanning, audit-ready for ANAM.
Foreign-trade integrated-logistics experience supercharged with end-to-end digital traceability.

cta.title: Ready for an end-to-end auditable facility?
cta.subtitle: Book a demo and we'll show you how to digitize warehouse control, document management and the traceability the authority requires.

hero.title: One platform for your entire
hero.subtitle: When every system speaks a different language, you lose hours reconciling data and money on half-empty trucks. Geodot unifies WMS, TMS, routing and palletizing in one platform: the routing engine and the palletizer work together, in real time, to load to 99% and route by business value.

modules.title: Modules that work as one
modules.description: Geodot doesn't replace your ERP, it amplifies it. We integrate with SAP, BASIS and Oracle through our own APIs, down to a level of detail SAP S/4HANA can't reach: routing and palletizing calculated together, with 300+ parameters per SKU.

cta.title: What's your biggest logistics leak?
cta.subtitle: Trucks at 85%, routes planned by hand, rejections you catch too late. Book a demo and we'll show you, in your own operation, how much you can recover.

hero.title: Logistics that understands your
hero.subtitle: Every sector has its own pressure: turnover, cold chain, compliance, multi-client. Geodot adapts to the operation you already run and adds traceability, routing and palletizing exactly where you need them.

industriesIndex.title: Six industries,
industriesIndex.subtitle: Pick your sector and see how Geodot solves the concrete problems of your operation.

cta.title: Don't see your industry here?
cta.subtitle: If you move inventory, routes or trucks, Geodot adapts to your operation. Book a demo and we'll walk through your numbers.

hero.title: Measurable results, not
hero.subtitle: Bottlers, dairy, government and bonded warehouses have already recovered costs with Geodot. These are the numbers behind each operation —and yours could be next.

list.title: The impact of Geodot in numbers

items.result: Truck loads went from 85% to 99% and route planning from 3 hours to 15 minutes, cutting transport cost by 8%.
Automatic FEFO and lot-level traceability stopped supermarket rejections: they now trace any lot in minutes, not days.

hero.title: Born from operations,
hero.subtitle: 40+ combined years moving trucks and 15+ with leading bottlers. We built Geodot because we've fought the same fires you do —so we never need it explained why the glass goes on the bottom.

mission.title: Connecting every point of the supply chain

body: After more than 40 combined years in logistics, production and technology, we kept seeing the same problem: the tools never solved the whole operation. One system routed but didn't palletize. The WMS didn't talk to the TMS. And in the middle, operations teams juggling to make it all add up.

Geodot was born to end that. We built the first platform that unifies WMS, TMS, routing and palletizing in a single solution, where the routing engine and the palletizer work together, in real time, to load every truck to 99% and route by business value, not just kilometers.

We don't promise magic: we promise results you can measure from day one —fewer kilometers, fewer rejections, lower costs and fewer emissions. And we don't replace your ERP: we amplify it, integrating with SAP, BASIS and Oracle without breaking what already works.

We're a Mexican technology company operating across Mexico, Argentina, Colombia and Ecuador, with real experience in beverages, food, government, pharma and bonded warehouses. We imagine a world where every truck leaves at 100% and every product arrives fresh to the right customer. That's the world we're building —with you.

cta.title: Let's talk about your operation
cta.subtitle: Book a call and tell us your challenges. We want to understand your operation before we propose anything.
